title: If You Use Agent Zero, This Video is for You (EPIC FAIL)
summary: Jordan Urbs documents a failed attempt to run an ad campaign generation workflow on Agent Zero, encountering persistent LiteLLM errors that made the framework unusable for production. The video critiques Agent Zero's reliability and recommends caution, suggesting alternatives like Claude Code or OpenClaw would have succeeded.
